info.description: The Central NAC Service APIs are used for managing network access control policies.
info.title: Central NAC Service

get.description: This API retrieves a list of all user certificates based on the UPN. It requires a UPN as query parameter, which is a required input parameter.

parameters.description: A User Principal Name (UPN) used to uniquely identify a user. (e.g. john.smith@demo.onmicrosoft.com, john.smith@okta.com)
parameters.name: upn

200.description: Success: The user certificates have been retrieved.

400.description: Bad request: The request is malformed or invalid input was received.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

post.description:
This API revokes one or more certificates based on certificate details or a UPN (User Principal Name).
If certificate details are provided, each certificate must include the issuer, serial number, and subject,
and only the specified certificates will be revoked. Alternatively, if a UPN is provided, all certificates
associated with that UPN will be revoked.

requestBody.description:
The input object containing either the certificate details or UPN. Provide either the list of certificate
details (e.g., issuer: "CN=RootCA", serial: "1234567890ABCDEF", subject: "CN=john.doe@example.com") to
revoke specific certificates or the UPN (e.g., "john.doe@example.com") to revoke all certificates
associated with that UPN. Only one of these should be provided per request.

200.description: Success. The user certificates have been revoked.

400.description: Bad request: The request is malformed or invalid input was received.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

get.description:
This API retrieves a list of DPP registrations. The request may contain optional query parameters:
limit, next, offset, and search.
The response returns at most one page size of DPP registrations, each DPP registration is comprised
of a DPP registration ID and DPP URI. The count and next cursor is also returned.

parameters.description: Maximum number of DPP registrations to return in one page.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: A pagination cursor to retrieve the next page of DPP registrations. Either next or offset can be provided, but not both. If both are provided, next takes precedence.
parameters.name: next

parameters.description: An offset from the beginning of the result set to retrieve the next page of DPP registrations. Either next or offset can be provided, but not both. If both are provided, next takes precedence.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: A MAC address or MAC address substring with which to filter the DPP registrations.
parameters.name: search

200.description:
Success: Returns a list of DPP registrations, along with the count of DPP registrations
returned, and the cursor for the next page.

400.description: Bad request. The request is malformed or invalid input received.

412.description: Precondition Failed. The request has an invalid query parameter.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

post.description: This API registers a new DPP URI. The request contains the required DPP URI. The response returns the new DPP registration ID.

requestBody.description: An input object containing the DPP registration URI.

200.description: Success. The DPP registration has been created. The new DPP registration ID is returned.

400.description: Bad request. The request is malformed.

409.description: Conflict. The DPP registration already exists for MAC address.

412.description: Precondition Failed. The request has an invalid DPP URI.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

put.description: This API updates an existing DPP registration. The request contains the required DPP registration ID to update and the required new DPP URI. The response returns the DPP registration ID and DPP URI.

requestBody.description: The input object containing the DPP registration ID to update and the new DPP URI.

200.description: Success. The DPP registration has been updated. The DPP registration ID and updated DPP URI are returned.

400.description: Bad request. The request is malformed or invalid input received.

412.description: Precondition Failed. The request has an invalid DPP registration ID or DPP URI.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

delete.description: This API deletes a DPP registration. The request contains the required DPP registration ID to delete.

parameters.description: A DPP registration ID to delete.
parameters.name: id

204.description: Success. The DPP registration has been deleted.

400.description: Bad request. The request is malformed or invalid input received.

412.description: Precondition Failed. The request has an invalid DPP registration ID.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

get.description: This API retrieves a DPP registration. The request contains the required DPP registration ID to retrieve. The response returns the DPP registration ID and DPP URI.

parameters.description: A DPP registration ID to retrieve.
parameters.name: id

200.description: Success. The DPP registration has been retrieved.

400.description: Bad request. The request is malformed or invalid input received.

412.description: Precondition Failed. The request has an invalid DPP registration ID.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

get.description: This API lists import/export jobs with optional filters.

parameters.description: A type of job to filter on.
parameters.name: jobtype

parameters.description: Maximum number of registered jobs to be returned. Allowed range is 1 to 30.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: A pagination cursor for the next page of resources.
parameters.name: next

parameters.description: A zero-based resource offset from which to start the response.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: A search value to filter job results.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description:
The sort expression is a field name followed by a direction indicator asc (ascending) or desc (descending).
The first value in the expression defines the sort field and the second defines the sort order. If
expression is not specified, the default expression is 'createdAt desc'.
Supported fields are macAddress, name, enable, userRole, displayName, createdAt and modifiedAt.
Example: macAddress asc
parameters.name: sort

200.description: Success. The job details have been retrieved.

400.description: Bad request. The request is malformed or invalid input received.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

503.description: Service unavailable. The server is temporarily unavailable.

delete.description: This API deletes and terminates an import or export job.

401.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

429.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

parameters.description:
The sort expression is a field name followed by a direction indicator asc (ascending) or desc (descending).

expression is not specified, the default expression is 'createdAt asc'.
Supported fields are macAddress, displayName, createdAt and modifiedAt.
Example: macAddress asc
